achievements: Component reorganization: 23 loose files moved into 9 domain subfolders (task-panel, task-list, modals, project, layout, sidebar, settings, task-edit, kanban) with index.tsx barrels and named exports
Health/Meds page: full PK model (MEC/MTC therapeutic window, crash-risk dC/dt detection, tMaxOffset+keMultiplier sliders, ReferenceArea chart overlays) in pharmacokinetics.ts + HealthPage.tsx
Theme expansion: 11 new themes added (Dracula, Gruvbox, Solarized, Rose Pine, Midnight, Everforest, Catppuccin, Tokyo Night, Kanagawa, Monokai, Slate) with contrast fixes on existing themes
Supabase sync hardened: delta upsert/delete (no full-workspace wipe), fire-and-forget push, debounced in main process
SessionsCalendar perf: pre-grouped day map, stable pointerDown handler, Date.parse sort, cached constants
Settings refactor: SyncSection collapsible, UI scale moved into ThemeSection header
